title: Maps and Timeline Supplement — The Spiral Continuum
description: A free supplement to The Spiral Continuum: nine parchment-stylized maps (one per volume plus a master overall map) and a complete chronological series timeline. Hosted as a public GitHub release; readers can download the latest PDF directly.
why_separate: KDP forbids mixed B&W and color in a single paperback interior. The interior books are B&W; the maps and timeline are color. Hosting them as a free supplement preserves the color rendering and keeps the printed book at a reasonable price.

items: Book 1 — Lisbon · Atlantic · upper Rio Negro
Book 3 — Cabeceiras de Basto · Andean approach
Book 4 — Almeida's 87-year life across four panels
Book 5 — Cabeceiras de Basto · the 1948 voyage
Overall — every site, every path, every life journey
Master chronological timeline spanning ~1700 BCE through 2029 CE
